data_coverage_summary: DepotFinity is a cloud-based software service that is used to monitor, report, schedule and manage the charging operations of chargers within a depot. Published API scope focuses on managing reservation and RFID-related records.
buyer_guidance: Use these APIs when the integration needs to manage reservations or RFID-linked operational records in DepotFinity.
overview: DepotFinity is a cloud-based software service that is used to monitor, report, schedule and manage the charging operations of chargers within a depot. These surfaces manage scheduling and credential-like records that support charging operations rather than live telemetry feeds. Asset data is Supported. Telemetry data is Un-Supported. Writeback is Supported.

available_data.description: Published API scope focuses on managing reservation and RFID-related records.

ingest_considerations: The published surface includes mutation or submission capabilities, so integrations should enforce explicit governance around which upstream systems are allowed to write.
Representative operations were pulled from the published spec artifact to keep the capability classification tied to the documented surface.

source_evidence.evidence_notes: Classification is based on the official Siemens product overview and the published spec artifact for RFID Management API.
